content.description: Notebook content as a ProseMirror JSON document structure. For markdown notebooks this is a rendered cache of `markdown_content`.

content_storage.description:
Canonical storage format for the notebook body. `json` is the legacy ProseMirror format; `markdown` stores markdown natively.

* `json` - json
* `markdown` - markdown

deleted.description: Whether the notebook has been soft-deleted.

markdown_content.description: Canonical markdown document for markdown-backed notebooks.

text_content.description: Plain text representation of the notebook content for search.

version.description: Version number for optimistic concurrency control. Must match the current version when updating content.
